content: 3 Beyond' s first issue, dated July 1953, included an editorial by Gold in which he laid out the magazine's scope, excluding in his words only "the probably possible" and "the unentertaining"
summary: 3 Beyond' s first issue, dated July 1953, included an editorial by Gold in which he laid out the magazine's scope, excluding in his words only "the probably possible" and "the unentertaining"
